title: 5G handover failures in Kuwait City cluster
description: Customers are reporting dropped sessions and failed handovers after the 22:10 radio stack refresh. KPI dashboard shows a spike in RRC re-establishment attempts and 5G attach failures.
resolution_summary: Rolled back the radio stack refresh and restarted affected DU nodes.
root_cause: Misconfigured neighbor relation table after deployment.

title: SMS delivery delay for prepaid subscribers
description: SMS delivery latency is above 90 seconds for prepaid users in the evening peak. The queue depth is growing and SMPP acknowledgements are delayed.
resolution_summary: Scaled the message broker and cleared the stalled queue partitions.
root_cause: Downstream connector throttling caused backlog accumulation.

title: Billing invoice generation lag after month-end close
description: Nightly invoice generation is taking 3x longer than baseline after month-end close. ETL logs show repeated retries on the aggregation job.
resolution_summary: Optimized the aggregation query and added pre-aggregation tables.
root_cause: Full table scan on a growing usage table.

title: NMS alarm flood after planned maintenance
description: The network management system is generating hundreds of duplicate alarms after scheduled maintenance in the west region. Operators are unable to focus on critical events.
resolution_summary: Applied alarm suppression rules for the maintenance window.
root_cause: Missing suppression rule for planned maintenance alarms.

title: CRM login timeout for customer care agents
description: Agents report timeouts while logging into the CRM application during shift change. Auth service metrics show a spike in token validation latency.
resolution_summary: Increased token validation cache size and restarted the auth gateway.
root_cause: Cache saturation during concurrent login burst.

title: Device portal API latency spike in the evening
description: The device portal API response time is above 2 seconds for a subset of users. Error rate remains low but CPU saturation on the API cluster is climbing.
resolution_summary: Added horizontal scaling and query caching.
root_cause: Hot partition causing uneven load distribution.
